# Geoffrey Muthoni — Frontend Developer & IT Lead Portfolio

> Frontend Developer and IT Lead in Nairobi, Kenya. 4+ years building Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Supabase web apps, plus NSE data pipelines and AI-powered automation.

Geoffrey Muthoni (Geoffrey Mwangi) is available for remote, contract, and full-time Frontend Developer, AI/Automation, and IT Lead roles.

## About

- Name: Geoffrey Mwangi Muthoni
- Role: Frontend Developer & IT Lead
- Current: IT Lead & Frontend Developer at Mwango Capital (Dec 2025 - Present)
- Focus: Data-driven web apps, automated NSE financial dashboards, AI & workflow automation
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya (remote-friendly)
- Experience: 4+ years
- Certifications: Google AI Professional Certificate (Coursera, 2026), Anthropic Claude AI
- Email: gmwangi3174@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/geoffrey-muthoni/

## Core Technologies

Next.js (App Router, Server Components), React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Node.js, Framer Motion, Claude AI, Cursor, n8n, Google Apps Script, Git, Vercel

## Services

- Custom website and web application development
- React and Next.js frontend engineering
- WordPress themes, plugins, WooCommerce, Elementor
- Wix and Velo development
- Responsive, accessible, SEO-optimized UI builds
